disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Abrupt onset of fast, regular palpitations that started instantaneously, like a switch being flipped
trigger_question_examples: When and how did the racing start?
Did it come on gradually or all at once?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started all at once, out of nowhere — one second I was fine and the next my heart was going like a machine gun. It felt like a switch was flipped.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lightheadedness and near-fainting, worse on standing, during the ongoing episode
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel faint or dizzy?
What happens when you stand up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel really lightheaded, and when I stand up it's like I'm about to black out, so I'm staying sitting down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A prominent pounding or fluttering sensation felt in the neck during the episode
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel any pounding in your neck?
Any fluttering sensation in your throat or neck?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — there's a really strong pounding right here in my neck, like something is thumping in my throat.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: High caffeine intake immediately before onset — two double espressos
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any coffee, energy drinks or stimulants today?
What were you doing before it started?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I had two large double espressos this afternoon — the empty cups are still on the table.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Chest tightness and mild breathlessness on exertion during the episode
trigger_question_examples: Is there any chest tightness or pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My chest feels tight and I got a bit puffed just walking to the kitchen, but it's not a crushing pain.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No crushing central chest pain and no known family history of sudden cardiac death
trigger_question_examples: Any heavy or crushing chest pain?
Has anyone in your family died suddenly or young from a heart problem?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No crushing pain in the centre of my chest, and no, nobody in my family has had a sudden heart death that I know of.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone; no one else is present during the episode
trigger_question_examples: Is there anyone with you right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I live on my own and I'm here by myself right now.
